Asterion Infologics Limited — operational incident report (India), ref OI/2026/042, listed on NSE/BSE, business vertical: enterprise software.
On 28 May 2026 13:22 IST, an internal wiki space used by investor relations and legal was misconfigured to public read for 47 minutes; SOC alert closed the window and access logs show five anonymous views with no bulk download.
Content in scope: public/stale materials such as the 2023 press pack and board memo excerpts on the already-announced amalgamation with Trivana Retail Private Limited, including the line “the transaction is not expected to have a material adverse effect.”
Templates observed: “term_sheet_template_v5.docx,” a generic “definitive_agreement_outline.pdf,” a deal checklist shell, and a header stamp reading “non-public draft” applied to boilerplates; none contained current counterparties, pricing, or timelines.
A CSR signup sheet listed two volunteers marked “under 18” with guardian consent status only; no contact details, Aadhaar, PAN, GSTIN, biometrics, or health data were stored.
Placeholder fields in examples showed invalid formats (e.g., Aadhaar: 0000-0000-000; PAN: ABCD12345; GSTIN: 27ABCDE1234F1), indicating no live identifiers under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act.
SEBI (PIT) assessment: based on forensic review, the exposed content substantially matched public research notes dated Q3–Q4 FY24 and did not reveal UPSI.
One draft investor-relations note contained an embargo instruction: “do not release before 14 Aug 2026 09:15 IST”; the file has been quarantined and access is restricted to the company secretary group.
Trading window remains as scheduled for Q1 FY27; no additional closure or disclosure is being made to NSE/BSE at this stage, and no Form B/C triggers were identified.
Regulatory posture: not material under Reg 30 of SEBI LODR; we will voluntarily notify exchanges only if final RCA indicates any UPSI event or adverse impact.
DPDPA compliance review confirms no consent artifacts beyond checkbox logs and anonymized tokens; children’s data was limited to age and consent flags without identifiers.
Remediation: wiki space set to private, S3 policy hardened, DLP tuned to flag generic “non-public” markers on upload, quarterly access reviews reinstated, and templates moved to a restricted repository.
next steps: finalize rca, update the deal checklist to include an embargo-text scan, deliver refresher training, and schedule a wellness spa day on friday after patch deployment.
Contacts: grievance officer (India) — grievance@asterion.example; investor relations — ir@asterion.example; for public complaints use SEBI SCORES portal helpline as published.
Note: this report references public-source materials and already announced matters; placeholders should not be construed as live data or commitments.
